checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
CORS: open access (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Cloudflare detected (passive — no active challenge)
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, chatgpt, claude, ccbot
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 328 divs with only 30 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 134/239 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 4/9 inputs have names, 9/9 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Likely a client-side SPA — minimal server-rendered content
No h1 heading — page lacks a clear title for agents
7 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 204/211 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 404 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~95,922 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 19 — moderately nested
Reading this page costs $0.12–$1.44 per load ($0.60–$7.19 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
11/42 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
Found 1 elements with positive tabindex — may confuse agent tab navigation
5 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
16 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 272ms
Moderate payload: 375KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 11 scripts
Compression enabled: gzip
